text:
君のおかげで、海岸も平和になった！
次こそは、オレも一緒に行くぞ！

姐さんからの「宿題」はいいのかだと？
ははっ、あとは資料にまとめるだけだ。

まだ何にも手をつけていないが
最後の日にやれば終わるだろう！
未来のオレよ、頼んだぞ

And so peace has returned to the Coast, all
thanks to you! Next time I'll be sure to make
it down there with you!

Oh, the homework Ms. Maria has me working
on? Oh, nothing to worry about. All that's left
to do now is consolidation. Easy!

Sure, it's nowhere near finished, but that's
what the day before it's due is for, right?
The me of tomorrow is excellent at this stuff!
